creator: freebsd@beardz.net
text:
On 16/03/2011 17:58, Frederic Culot wrote:
> Hi Jase,
>
> thanks for submitting this PR.
> However, I am not sure we need to add the p5-Test-Simple dependency you
> suggest. Indeed, the vendor listed this module as a build dependency
> and not a runtime one. Hence I believe it is only used to perform the
> tests during installation phase, which we don't do anyway. Moreover,
> this dependency is not imported in Test/Fatal.pm.
> So unless you prove me wrong I would say that we don't need to modify
> this port.
>
> What do you think about it?
>
> culot@

Hi Frederic,

I wasn't aware that we don't perform tests during installation phase, 
although looking at it in hindsight, it should have been obvious. 
Therefore I defer to your knowledge on the matter and am happy for the 
PR to be closed. Thanks for pointing this issue out to me, I shall 
certainly keep it in mind for future p5- PRs.

Kind regards,

Jase.
